nasb.text: Then He said, ‘I will hide My face from them, I will see what their end shall be; For they are a perverse generation, Sons in whom is no faithfulness.

esv.text: And he said, ‘I will hide my face from them; I will see what their end will be, for they are a perverse generation, children in whom is no faithfulness.

cnv.text: 說：‘我必掩面不顧他們， 要看看他們的結局怎樣； 因為他們是乖曲的一代， 心裡沒有信實的人。

ccb.text: 说，‘这堕落的子民， 不忠的儿女！ 我要掩面不理他们， 看他们的结局如何。
